title: maxillaria cuencana
intro: Maxillaria cuencana is a species of orchid native to Ecuador, classified as a terrestrial orchid due to its growth habit on the forest floor. The plant has been traditionally used in Ecuadorian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Research has shown that Maxillaria cuencana has potential health benefits, such as wound healing and antioxidant activity, which may be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. In traditional medicine, the plant is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture, although further research is needed to standardize its use and potential applications.
